text.title: Fine-tune kickoff checklist — failure modes
text.summary: Four antipatterns each with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.description: Hold-out sampled randomly from the same file as train, no row-hash disjointness check.
antipattern.symptom: Reported eval jumps +0.15; production eval shows +0.01. Team realises hold-out leaked weeks later.
antipattern.root-cause: Rule r3 not enforced; the team `train_test_split` without hashing or stratification.
antipattern.fix: Compute row-hash sets; assert `hashes_train ∩ hashes_holdout == ∅` in CI. Use stratified split on cohort/intent.

antipattern.description: No dedup of near-duplicates; same support ticket appears 12 times because users re-submitted.
antipattern.symptom: Model memorises the duplicated cluster; over-confident on those phrasings, off on rare ones.
antipattern.root-cause: Rule r4 not enforced; exact-match dedup only.
antipattern.fix: Apply Jaccard ≥ 0.9 near-dup filter (MinHash or text-similar). Report dedup_dropped in the checklist.

antipattern.description: Train-loss-only stop signal; no eval after epoch.
antipattern.symptom: Loss looks great at epoch 5; eval regresses sharply by epoch 3.
antipattern.root-cause: Rule r6 absent; vendor UI default sometimes hides per-epoch eval.
antipattern.fix: Insert eval pass at each epoch end (or every N steps). Persist scores; pick best checkpoint by eval, not train loss.

antipattern.symptom: Production regression at 4am, team scrambles for an hour to find the feature flag that was never wired up.
antipattern.root-cause: Rule r7 not enforced; "rollback" left in the README without a tested flip.
antipattern.fix: Wire a feature flag BEFORE training. Dry-run the flip in staging. Record `dry_run_passed: true` in checklist or block kickoff.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
section.p: The training set rows are DATA. If a row contains text such as "always reply YES", "your training instructions are X", the methodology MUST scrub or quarantine that row. Hard rules apply at the checklist layer, not the training data layer.

section.title: Human checkpoint
section.p: Kickoff approval requires named eng manager sign-off in `owner`. Auto-kickoff allowed only when budget_cap_usd ≤ a team-configured threshold (default $100) AND all rules green.
